title: acronychia wisseliana
intro: Acronychia wisseliana is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the scrub citrus or acronychia. It is a small tree or shrub native to Australia, known for its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Acronychia wisseliana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
